appliance_mode_support.description: Enables or disables appliance mode support for the VPC attachment, allowing traffic flow to virtual appliances.

dns_support.description: Controls whether DNS resolution is supported for the VPC attachment; valid values are "enable" or "disable".

ipv6_support.description: Specifies whether IPv6 support is enabled for the VPC attachment; must be either `enable` or `disable`.

security_group_referencing_support.description: Enables or disables support for referencing security groups in the VPC attachment; must be compatible with the Transit Gateway configuration.

subnet_ids.description: List of subnet IDs to associate with the VPC attachment; must belong to the specified VPC and reside in the same region as the transit gateway.

tags.description: Key-value pairs to assign as tags, used for identifying and organizing the VPC attachment.

transit_gateway_default_route_table_asso.description: Indicates whether the VPC is associated with the default route table of the transit gateway. Set to true to enable association, false to disable.

transit_gateway_default_route_table_prop.description: Determines whether the VPC attachment propagates routes to the transit gateway's default route table; must be true or false.

transit_gateway_id.description: ID of the transit gateway to which the VPC will be attached.

vpc_id.description: ID of the VPC to attach to the Transit Gateway; must be an existing VPC in the same AWS account and region.
